welcome: 👋 Welcome to The Cloud! Book a table at our venue right here in Telegram. Выберите язык / Choose language:
enter_phone: 📞 Enter your phone number or tap the button below:
enter_comment: 💬 Any special requests? Type a comment or tap Skip:
invalid_phone: ❗ Invalid phone format. Please enter in format +7XXXXXXXXXX:
invalid_name: ❗ Name must be at least 2 characters. Please try again:
booking_confirmed_user: ✅ Your booking #{id} has been submitted! ⏳ We will confirm your booking within 15 minutes. Thank you for choosing The Cloud! 🍸
booking_accepted: 🎉 Your booking #{id} is confirmed! See you at The Cloud 🍸
booking_rejected: 😔 Unfortunately, booking #{id} cannot be accepted. Please contact us directly for details.
error_generic: ⚠️ Something went wrong. Please try again or type /start
poster_sync_fail: ⚠️ Could not sync with Poster. Booking saved locally.
